description: The on-screen keyboard is dismissed as the user prepares to interact with the form toggles.
frame_description: The 'Estimate interest rate' screen is visible; the keyboard at the bottom of the screen slides down and disappears.

description: User clicks the 'I don't know, skip' toggle to bypass entering an interest rate.
frame_description: The user's finger taps the toggle switch next to 'I don't know, skip'.

description: The 'I don't know, skip' toggle moves to the active position and changes color to purple.
frame_description: The toggle switch is now in the 'on' position, highlighted in purple.

description: User clicks the 'No' button for the question 'Are you currently on a fixed rate?'.
frame_description: The user taps the 'No' option button under the fixed rate question.

description: The 'No' button UI updates to a selected state with a purple border and fill.
frame_description: The 'No' button is now highlighted, indicating it has been selected.

description: The application navigates to the next step in the flow: identifying the current lender.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the interest rate form to a new page titled 'Who is your current lender'.

description: User clicks into the lender search input field to begin typing.
frame_description: The user taps the search bar, and the keyboard reappears at the bottom of the screen.

description: User types 'St George' into the lender search field.
frame_description: Characters 'St George' appear in the search bar as the user types on the keyboard.

description: User selects 'St George' from the autocomplete suggestion list.
frame_description: The user taps the 'St George' entry in the dropdown list below the search bar.

description: The application navigates to the property value estimation screen.
page_title: How much do you think your property is worth?
frame_description: The screen transitions to a page asking for the estimated property value.

description: User clicks the property value input field to enter a dollar amount.
frame_description: The user taps the input field marked with a '$' symbol.

description: User types '1100000' into the property value field.
frame_description: The value '$ 1,100,000' is entered into the field.

description: The application navigates to the refinancing goal selection screen.
frame_description: The screen transitions to a page with several goal options like 'Decrease repayments' and 'Pay off loan faster'.

description: User clicks the 'Pay off loan faster' goal option.
frame_description: The user taps the second button in the list of refinancing goals.

description: The application navigates to the property usage screen.
page_title: How will this property be used?
frame_description: The screen transitions to a page asking if the property is a home or an investment.

description: User clicks the 'I will live there' button.
frame_description: The user taps the first option button on the property usage screen.

description: The application navigates to the lender features preference screen.
page_title: Are any of the following important to you when choosing a lender?
frame_description: The screen transitions to a page with icons for different lender features.

description: User selects 'Major lender' as an important feature.
frame_description: The 'Major lender' icon is tapped and becomes highlighted.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT' button to proceed.
frame_description: The user taps the purple 'NEXT' button at the bottom of the screen.

description: The application navigates to the credit history self-assessment screen.
page_title: What do you think your credit history is?
frame_description: The screen transitions to a page with credit rating options.

description: User clicks the 'Excellent - No issues' credit history option.
frame_description: The user taps the top button in the credit history list.

description: The application navigates to the income source selection screen.
page_title: How do you earn your income?
frame_description: The screen transitions to a page asking about employment status.

description: User clicks the 'I'm an employee' button.
frame_description: The user taps the first option on the income source screen.

description: The application navigates to the final step: entering the user's name.
page_title: One last thing, what's your first name?
frame_description: The screen transitions to a page with a single text input for the user's first name.

description: User clicks the first name input field.
interaction_target: Type your first name here input
frame_description: The user taps the text box, and the keyboard appears.

description: User types 'JANE DO' into the first name field.
interaction_target: Type your first name here input
frame_description: The name 'JANE DO' is typed into the input field.

description: User clicks the 'GET MY HOME LOAN MATCHES' button.
interaction_target: GET MY HOME LOAN MATCHES button
frame_description: The user taps the large purple button below the name input.

description: A loading screen appears while the application processes the form data.
frame_description: A white screen with a purple animated logo and the text 'Loading.... You're moving along nicely.' is displayed.

description: The application navigates to the phone number verification screen.
frame_description: The screen transitions to a page asking for an Australian mobile phone number.

description: User clicks the phone number input field.
frame_description: The user taps the input field next to the '+61' flag icon.

description: User types '0442238885' into the phone number field.
frame_description: The phone number is entered digit by digit into the field.

description: User clicks the 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button to submit their phone number.
frame_description: The user taps the purple button below the phone number input.

description: A loading spinner appears on the button, indicating the submission is being processed.
frame_description: The 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button text is replaced by a white animated loading spinner.

description: An error message appears indicating a problem with the submission.
frame_description: A red error box appears below the phone number input with the text 'Something Went Wrong. Please try again shortly or contact us for further assistance.'
